name: Files Deleted from Sensitive File Directories
notes:
This rule detects when there is a file deletion event from a sensitive file directory and then removes the file name from the Files in Sensitive Directories reference set as a Rule Response.

Note: In 7.3.2 and earlier versions, the reference set does not link properly to "Files in Sensitive Directories - AlphaNumeric". This was corrected in 7.3.2 patch 1.

If you do not have 7.3.2 patch 1 installed, you can do the following:
Select the rule, and click "Next". Under "Rule Response", click the drop-down menu for the reference set, and select "Files in Sensitive Directories - AlphaNumeric".
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: File Deleted Events
when an event matches any of the following BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories
TD_list: APPLY Files Deleted from Sensitive File Directories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: File Deleted Events
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories
RED_list: Remove "Filename" from Reference Set: "Files in Sensitive Directories"
